label: Boss group wave
description: Defines the composition of a single boss encounter wave: how many boss instances appear, their equipped apparel, and the escort mechs.

bossCount.label: Boss count
bossCount.description: Number of boss instances that appear in this wave.

bossApparel.label: Boss apparel
bossApparel.description: Apparel items equipped on each boss instance in this wave. Each li element is a ThingDef defName. Shipped XML uses a <thing> child wrapper inside each li; RimWorld resolves both formats via InnerText.

escorts.label: Escorts
escorts.description: Escort mechs that appear alongside the boss. Each child element name is a PawnKindDef defName; the text content is the escort count.
